dependencies: Relies on third-party contractors for construction and maintenance
Depends on availability of construction materials including steel
Subject to potential tariffs on construction materials
risks: Inclement weather and natural disasters causing construction delays
Cost increases for construction materials including tariff impacts
Delays in performance by third-party contractors

regulatory_risks: FERC regulation of interstate natural gas pipelines and rates
CPUC regulation of California intrastate operations
Railroad Commission of Texas regulation of Texas intrastate operations
EPA environmental regulations including Good Neighbor Plan for ozone emissions
PHMSA pipeline safety regulations and integrity management requirements
Clean Air Act and NAAQS standards
Clean Water Act and Oil Pollution Act requirements
CERCLA Superfund liability
GHG emissions regulations and climate change policies
State-level GHG cap-and-trade programs
European Union methane emissions limits on imports
TSA cybersecurity directives for critical pipelines
Jones Act restrictions on vessel ownership and operations
Dodd-Frank derivatives regulations
SEC climate disclosure requirements
California climate disclosure legislation
OSHA employee health and safety requirements
Potential changes in federal and state environmental policies
Rate challenges and complaints from shippers
Environmental justice considerations in permitting
Increased regulatory scrutiny and enforcement actions
New pipeline safety rules including leak detection requirements
Reauthorization of Pipeline Safety Act
PHMSA regulation of CO2 transportation
Restrictions on oil and gas exploration on federal lands
Hydraulic fracturing regulations
Asset abandonment and reclamation requirements
